variants: Rakuunu Fanen is a Crimson Filigree Inspector who plays a vital role in the Artisan Guild Collective, where she actively supports and promotes local artisans. She has published her research in the respected Firebreak Spindle Press, making significant contributions to the discourse on craftsmanship. Her initiatives are primarily funded by the Meridian Innovators Bureau, an organization dedicated to fostering innovation in the arts. In her work, Rakuunu utilizes Haitian Creole text as her professional language, ensuring her outreach is accessible to a diverse audience.

Additionally, she engages with her community primarily in Haitian Creole text, facilitating rich dialogue and collaboration.
